entries.topic: Climate
entries.source_excerpt: Distribution of Temperature, Rainfall, winds in Summer and Winter and factors affecting the climate of India (latitudes, altitude, distance from sea, winds, Himalayas, jet streams, and El Nino). Monsoon and its mechanism. Seasons: Summer; Monsoon, Retreating Monsoon and Winter. Temperature and pressure conditions, wind movements, local winds, precipitation and interpretation of climate data.
